title: Billotia elliptica

The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help in reducing inflammation and protecting against cell damage. Bioactive constituents of Billotia elliptica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
